items.translated_title: Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs raises $1.03 billion to build world models
items.content: AMI Labs, the new venture cofounded by Turing Prize winner Yann LeCun after he left Meta, has raised $1.03 billion at a $3.5 billion pre-money valuation.

items.translated_title: An iPhone-hacking toolkit used by Russian spies likely came from U.S military contractor
items.content: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S. government defense contractor said some of those hacking tools were theirs.

items.translated_title: Anthropic launches code review tool to check flood of AI-generated code
